_note: Space Marine faction notes — key rules and gotchas
army_rule_description: At the start of your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, you can re-roll Hit rolls against that unit.
key_rules: Oath of Moment: re-roll Hit rolls vs selected enemy unit
Shock Assault: +1 A in melee if charged or heroically intervened
And They Shall Know No Fear: ignore battleshock modifiers
notes: Space Marines are the 'baseline' marine faction — Oath of Moment is their army rule
Unlike Dark Angels, SM gets the buff on Oath of Moment (re-roll Hits)
Terminators have 5+ invuln (not 4+ like GK Terminators)
No native FNP on any unit (unlike GK's Aegis 6+)
Dreadnoughts are T9-10, W8-12 — durable gun platforms
Land Raider is T12, W16 — the toughest transport in the game
